next_steps: Perform a bone biopsy of the sternal or humeral lesion for histopathology and microbial cultures
Send serology for Bartonella henselae (IgG and IgM) and perform Bartonella PCR on biopsy tissue
Complete blood count with peripheral smear and possible bone marrow aspirate/biopsy
Perform whole-body bone scintigraphy or PET-CT to evaluate extent of bone involvement
Infectious disease consultation to consider evaluation for atypical mycobacterial or fungal infections
Perform serology for Bartonella henselae (IgG and IgM) and Bartonella PCR on biopsy/tissue if available
Bone biopsy of the sternal or humeral lesion for histopathology, aerobic/anaerobic cultures, and fungal/AFB cultures
Measure inflammatory markers (ESR, CRP) to assess disease activity
Infectious disease consultation for evaluation of zoonotic and granulomatous diseases
Complete blood count with peripheral smear and evaluation for cytopenias
Perform whole-body metabolic imaging (PET-CT) to characterize metabolic activity of lesions
